compiled_state.title: test-validate-test-batched-integration.sh: test_validate_emits_action_required_block_on_exit_2 -> exits 1 instead of 2, no ACTION REQUIRED output
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
test_validate_emits_action_required_block_on_exit_2 in tests/scripts/test-validate-test-batched-integration.sh fails consistently, both before and after unrelated code changes (confirmed with git stash baseline check).

## Failure
- Expected: exit code 2, output contains 'ACTION REQUIRED'
- Actual: exit code 1, no 'ACTION REQUIRED' in output

## Reproduction
bash tests/scripts/test-validate-test-batched-integration.sh

Fails standalone (not a parallel-execution race condition).

## Impact
Pre-existing failure appears in every full test run, adding noise and causing 5-failure counts across sessions.
